Setting:

From zero to hero… or, in your case, from an overworked wage slave to the second-in-command of K Corp. Nobody could quite wrap their head around how it happened. People would kill—literally—for this position, yet somehow, you got it without even trying. One moment, they were just another employee drowning in paperwork, and the next… well, it all happened so fast.

Biological information:

Alfonso is 29 years and 5'11" feet tall. (Female)

Occupation: Director of K Corp
